source.extractionBoundary: Plugin reference template stores only the component subtree and required page-level dependencies. Source package path and long resource IDs are redacted/placeholders; generated packages must remap all resource IDs to the target app.

usageContract.host: Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 business-content slot such as section_content_area
usageContract.copyRule: Copy card_with_multiselect_toolbar_wrapper and all descendants as the component root. Do not recreate the component from simplified controls.
usageContract.immutableByDefault: All containers and controls are locked unless listed in editableRegions or repeatableOptionalParts.

editableRegions.rule: May edit title/subtitle/business heading content only. Preserve container style/layout contract.
May add/delete normal-mode controls. Recommended to keep Search filter and Add item button; Search placeholder and Add button text may be changed. Every added button must bind to a valid action.
May add/delete batch-operation buttons. Recommended to keep Delete selected items. btn_set_items is optional. Every batch button must bind to a valid action.

May map item content to fields from the selected Collection data source. Use Dynamic user for user fields, Dynamic image for image fields, Dynamic file for file/attachment fields, Dynamic field for all other fields. Include one subject-style Dynamic field similar to Survey Program name using Large/Semi bold typography.
Optional item operations region. May remove it or add per-item action controls such as Edit/Delete. Every operation must bind to a valid action.

repeatableOptionalParts.rule: Optional batch action button. Can be retained, removed, renamed, or copied for additional batch actions only if each copy has a valid action binding.

lockedRegions.rule: Component root and structural wrapper styles/layout must remain export-shape identical except for allowed descendant edits.
Must remain unchanged, including both icon children and action/selection bindings.

Collection root settings, Collection actions, selection behavior, data/action wiring, pagination/layout style, and item template host must remain unchanged except app-specific data-source remapping through supported generator logic.

subjectField.requiredTypography: Large / Semi bold equivalent from source control; preserve source export-shaped typography attributes when remapping.

confirm_qs.value: Items has been set to Completed.
Are you sure that you want to delete this item?

visualIntent.designMockValueBoundary: value remains live runtime binding; Office Asset design comparison is informational only

validationExpectations: Generated dashboards using this template must contain card_with_multiselect_toolbar_wrapper with export-shape subtree fidelity.
Generated dashboards must preserve card_col_item_multi_select unchanged.
Generated dashboards must preserve Collection root actions and multiselect action settings.
Generated dashboards must include required page-level tempVars/formAction/actions/filterVars used by the component.
Generated dashboards must reject unknown/simplified card multiselect templates and ad hoc rewritten toolbar/card structures.
